calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants (Notices)
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for default judgment and prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:33:17 a.m. and concluding at 10:57:07 a.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C. represented by Mark M. Scott, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Custom Veneers, Inc., a North Carolina Corporation not appearing.
Defendant David Martin not appearing.
Defendant D. Scott Martin and as Scott Martin not appearing.

MATTHEW JACOBS, Senior Litigation Paralegal is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Trinity Payment History Report
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Letter to Custom Veneers. Inc. dated Jun-28-2021
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - Account Balance Statement

MATTHEW JACOBS is examined by the Court.
Pursuant to the default packet and statements submitted by Plaintiff's witness, the Court finds sufficient evidence to prove breach of equipment finance agreement and guaranty.

Court modifies damages and prejudgment interest as follows:

1. Plaintiff is entitled to $141,425.66 in damages.
2. Dates of accrued prejudgment interest from May-06-2020 to Jan-20-2022 at a rate of 10 %. Plaintiff is entitled to prejudgment interest for a total of 624 days.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., and against Defendant Custom Veneers, Inc., a North Carolina Corporation, Defendant David Martin, and Defendant D. Scott Martin and as Scott Martin as follows:

1. Damages: $141,425.66
2. Prejudgment Interest: $24,173.76
3. Attorney Fees: $1,683.00
4. Costs: $915.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $168,197.42

Proposed judgment signed and filed as modified.

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants (Notices)
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Continued To Oct-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for deault prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:11:25 a.m. and concluding at 10:17:45 a.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, LLC a Washington Liability Company represented by Mark M. Scott, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Custom Veneers, Inc., a North Carolina Corporation not appearing.

MATTHEW JACOBS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff failed to provide and file notice of today's hearing to the Defendant.
Court orders matter continued to 10/20/2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for default prove-up hearing.

Plaintiff is ordered to serve and file notice of continued hearing forthwith.
